# services.hyprshell

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.hyprshell`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.hyprshell.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable hyprshell. |
| `services.hyprshell.package` | `null or package` | The hyprshell package to use. |
| `services.hyprshell.settings` | `JSON value` | Configuration settings for hyprshell. All the available options can be found here: https://github.com/H3rmt/hyprshell/blob/hyprshell-release/docs/CONFIGURE.md#config-options |
| `services.hyprshell.style` | `absolute path or strings concatenated with “\n”` | CSS file for customizing hyprshell. All the available options can be found here: https://github.com/H3rmt/hyprshell/blob/hyprshell-release/docs/CONFIGURE.md#css |
| `services.hyprshell.systemd.args` | `string` | Arguments to pass to the hyprshell service |
| `services.hyprshell.systemd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the hyprshell Systemd service. |
| `services.hyprshell.systemd.target` | `string` | The Systemd target that will start the hyprshell service |
